title: Best Available Seat
description: Find the best affordable option for each customer from a list of available seats

parts.title: Find best seat for each budget
parts.description: A venue sells seats at various price points. Implement findBestSeats(prices, budgets) / find_best_seats(prices, budgets) that takes an unsorted array of available seat prices and an array of customer budgets. For each budget, return the price of the most expensive seat the customer can afford (price <= budget), or -1 if no seat is within budget. Return the results as an array with the same length as the budgets array, in the same order, with -1 at any index where no seat is affordable.
activeTests: finds best seat for each budget
returns negative one when no seat is affordable
exact budget match returns that price
returns most expensive when all are affordable
empty price list returns all negative ones
output array length matches budgets array length
single budget with single price within budget
duplicate prices returns highest affordable price
selects most expensive affordable not first affordable
budget of zero with all positive prices returns negative one
returns zero when a free seat is the best match
does not mutate the prices or budgets arrays

scaffold.python:
"""
Find the best affordable seat for each customer budget.

Given an unsorted list of available seat prices and a list of customer budgets,
return the price of the most expensive seat each customer can afford (price <= budget),
or -1 if no seat is within budget.
"""
